text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Distributive justice and equity in transportation" by Rafael H. M. Pereira, Tim Schwanen, and David Banister is confirmed real, published in *Transport Reviews*, vol. 37, no. 2, pp. 170–191, with DOI 10.1080/01441647.2016.1257660. The cited authors and venue match exactly; the year discrepancy (2017 vs. published online 2016) reflects the print issue year versus the online publication date, a common citation variation.
LINK: https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/01441647.2016.1257660
